data.description:
Unreachable from dispatcher/cli/mcp; only its test references it. Branding fully DSO ('DSO Jira capability probe' summaries; :64 'the dso bridge use case'). RECOMMEND delete probe + tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py; alternative: adopt as a documented can-my-acli-reach-Jira preflight (rename strings, document in docs/releasing.md/README).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Decision recorded; files deleted OR adopted (de-dso'd + documented + reachable)
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Decide + delete or adopt: jira-capability-probe.py (+ test)
